name: Vague: find cheapest GPU and create pod
description: User wants the cheapest available GPU — agent must check pricing and pick the best option.
user_intent: What's the cheapest GPU you have available right now? Create a pod with it using runpod/pytorch:2.1.0. Name it rpcli-eval-vague-cheap.
expected_outcome: Agent checks GPU availability and pricing, identifies the cheapest option, and creates a pod with that GPU. The agent demonstrates understanding of pricing data.
